title: eragrostis sabulosa
intro: Eragrostis sabulosa, also known as sand grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis sabulosa include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis sabulosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
